## Validation Checklist

<!-- Before requesting a review, verify the following: -->

- [ ] Code follows the established engineering and design system standards.
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint` pass locally without errors.
- [ ] My commits follow the Conventional Commits format.
- [ ] (If applicable) Database schema changes are accompanied by migrations.
- [ ] (If applicable) Relevant documentation has been updated.
